user_story: What's actually trading on Zora today? Read-only research flow: surface the top trending coins by 24h volume, deep-dive into the most active one (creator profile, holders, price history), then make a buy/skip recommendation grounded in those signals. No execution.

turns.prompt: What coins are actually trading on Zora right now? Show me the top 10 trending and pick the one with the most 24h volume.
Pull the full coin detail, creator profile, top holders, and 7-day price history for that top coin.
